div.head: Memorandum by the Chief of the Division of Near Eastern Affairs (Murray)
div.p: After learning from the Secretary of Mr. James T. Williams that the text of the correction agreed upon with the Iranian Chargé d’Affaires was published in the first edition of the New York Daily Mirror today, March 26, I immediately informed Mr. Ghods, who said he had seen the correction and immediately informed his Government by telegraph that the correction had been published.
Mr. Ghods expressed deep appreciation for the assistance which the Department has rendered him in this matter.
